time_h: # Doxycycline 200 mg oral single-dose plasma concentration-time profile.
# Source: Agwuh KN & MacGowan A. J Antimicrob Chemother 2006;58(2):256-265
# value = plasma doxycycline concentration in mg/L.
# PROVENANCE: this paper is a REVIEW and contains NO concentration-time figure
#   (only parameter tables). This profile is therefore RECONSTRUCTED from the
#   review's Table 2 representative 200 mg oral single-dose parameters
#   scaled to Cmax 5.0 at tmax 2.6 h; AUC0-24 = 80 mg.h/L.
# The long t1/2 (elevated 24 h tail) is the point: it should expose that the
#   model's current doxycycline t1/2 is far too short (per registry notes).
